Class-Ranger 20 — Female Human Ranger: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 18 (+4) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 3; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 817147/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Roving: +10 Speed; heavy armor negates
Ability Boosts: 6 to distribute
Otherworldly Glamour: +2 Charisma checks
Roving: Has 40' climb and swim Speeds
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; Fighting Style: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Ranger (Ranger Fighting Style); Ranger (Ranger Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery; Boon Of Spell Recall; Great Weapon Fighting; Savage Attacker; Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Ranger Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Beast Master; Beguiling Twist; Bestial Fury; Defensive Tactics; Deft Explorer; Dread Ambusher; Dreadful Strikes; Druidic Warrior; Epic Boon; Exceptional Training; Expertise; Extra Attack; Favored Enemy; Feral Senses; Fey Reinforcements; Fey Wanderer Spells; Fey Wanderer; Fighting Style; Foe Slayer; Gloom Stalker Spells; Gloom Stalker; Hunter's Lore; Hunter's Prey; Hunter; Iron Mind; Misty Wanderer; Nature's Veil; Otherworldly Glamour; Precise Hunter; Primal Companion; Ranger Fighting Style; Ranger Subclass; Relentless Hunter; Roving; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Shadowy Dodge; Share Spells; Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival); Spellcasting; Stalker's Flurry; Superior Hunter's Defense; Superior Hunter's Prey; Tireless; Umbral Sight; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Ranger Fighting Style: 1 selection
Ranger Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Fey Wanderer Spells: Fey association shows a minor physical effect
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Umbral Sight: Has 60' Darkvision and is invisible to darkvision
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +10 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +15 Persuasion: (cha) +9
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +13 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +14
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Arcana; Athletics; Insight; Intimidation; Nature; Persuasion; Religion; Survival
Expertise: Intimidation; Nature; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Celestial; Common; Dwarvish; Infernal; Orc
Skill Notes:
Deft Explorer: Language (Choose 2 from any)/Has expertise in 1 chosen proficient skill
Expertise: Has expertise in 2 chosen proficient skills
Otherworldly Glamour: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Deception, Performance, Persuasion)
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Feral Senses: Has 30' Blindsight
Combat
Hit Points: 68 Initiative: +12 Armor Class: 15
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Longbow (+10 1d8+4 P R150/600; Slow); Sickle (+6 1d4 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+6 1 B); Whip (+10 1d4+4 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Defensive Tactics: Has the Escape The Horde and Multiattack Defense features
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Dread Ambusher: +2 Initiative
Hunter's Prey: Has the Colossus Slayer and Horde Breaker features
Stalker's Flurry: Has increased Dread Ambusher effects
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Beguiling Twist: R120' Can use a reaction in response to a successful save vs. charmed or frightened to inflict a choice of charmed or frightened on a different target for 1 min (save DC 16 Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end)
Bestial Fury: Companion can make 2 attacks in an Attack action, and the first companion hit each turn on a Hunter's Mark target inflicts +1d10 HP force
Colossus Slayer: Can inflict +1d8 HP with a weapon vs. an already-injured foe once per turn
Defensive Tactics: Can choose Escape The Horde or Multiattack Defense to be active after each rest
Dread Ambusher: Gains +10 Speed during the first rd of combat/Weapon attacks can inflict +2d8 HP psychic 2 times per long rest
Dreadful Strikes: Can inflict +1d6 HP psychic with a weapon once per turn
Escape The Horde: Foes have disadvantage on opportunity attacks targeting self
Exceptional Training: Can use a bonus action to command companion to Dash, Disengage, Dodge or Help instead of Attack, and companion attacks can inflict force damage
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Horde Breaker: Can make a second weapon attack on a foe adjacent to the first target once per turn
Hunter's Lore: Knows any immunities, resistances, or vulnerabilities of a Hunter's Mark target
Hunter's Prey: Can choose to have Colossus Slayer or Horde Breaker active after each rest
Multiattack Defense: Successful attackers suffer disadvantage on additional attacks on self in the same turn
Nature's Veil: Can use a bonus action to become invisible until the end of the next turn 2 times per long rest
Precise Hunter: Has advantage on attacks vs. Hunter's Mark target
Primal Companion: Primal beast companion (armor class 15; +6 ability checks and saves; +8 Beast's Strike) attacks when commanded as a bonus action or by foregoing a self attack; can choose after each long rest to summon a Beast of the Land (105 hit points; 40' Speed and climb Speed; 60' Darkvision; Beast's Strike inflicts 1d8+4 HP of a choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing, and a hit after a 20' charge inflicts +1d6 HP and knocked prone (Huge and larger creatures HP only)), Beast of the Sea (105 hit points; 5' Speed and 60' swim Speed; 90' Darkvision; can breathe water; Beast's Strike inflicts 1d6+4 HP of a choice of bludgeoning or piercing and grappled (save DC 16 Athletic or Acrobatics escapes), or Beast of the Sky (84 hit points; 10' Speed and 60' fly Speed; 60' Darkvision; flying away provokes no opportunity attacks; Beast's Strike inflicts 1d4+5 HP slashing)
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Shadowy Dodge: Can use a reaction to inflict disadvantage on an attacker who does not have advantage and to teleport 30'
Stalker's Flurry: After a successful Dread Ambusher attack, can make another attack against a foe adjacent to the target or inflict frightened (save DC 16 Wisdom negates) on creatures within 10' of the target
Superior Hunter's Prey: Can inflict Hunter's Mark damage to a second creature within 30' of the target once per turn
Tireless: Can use an action to gain 1d8+2 temporary hit points 2 times per long rest
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +10; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +6; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Iron Mind: Save Proficiency (Wisdom)
Beguiling Twist: Has advantage vs. charmed and frightened
Superior Hunter's Defense: Can use a reaction upon taking damage to gain resistance to that type of damage until the end of the current turn
Tireless: Exhaustion level decreases by 1 after a short rest
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; D0: 2; R: 15 Spell Slots: R1: 4; R2: 3; R3: 3; R4: 3; R5: 2 Attack: C: +8; R: +8 Spell DC: C: 16; R: 16
Spells:
Barkskin (R2 Tran): Willing touched gains Armor Class 17 for 1 hr
Charm Person (R1 [Fey Wanderer Spells] Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Commune With Nature (R5 Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cure Wounds (R1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Daylight (R3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Dimension Door (R4 [Fey Wanderer Spells] Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (R1 [Gloom Stalker Spells] Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Fear (R3 [Gloom Stalker Spells] Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Freedom Of Movement (R4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 40' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Greater Invisibility (R4 [Gloom Stalker Spells] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Guidance (C0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Hunter's Mark (R1 [Favored Enemy] Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d10 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Jump (R1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Locate Creature (R4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (R1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Message (D0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Mislead (R5 [Fey Wanderer Spells] Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 80' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Misty Step (R2 [Fey Wanderer Spells] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (R2 [Misty Wanderer] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Nondetection (R3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Pass Without Trace (R2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (R3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Poison (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Resistance (C0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resistance (D0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Rope Trick (R2 [Gloom Stalker Spells] Tran): Touched rope leads to an extradimensional space with room for 8 creatures for 1 hr
Seeming (R5 [Gloom Stalker Spells] Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Speak With Animals (R1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Summon Fey (R3 [Fey Reinforcements] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40' and can teleport 30'; multiattack equal to half the spell level; short sword inflicts 1d6+6 HP piercing plus 1d6 force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting), or tricksy (can create darkness in a 5' cube for 1 rd after teleporting) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and piercing damage by 1]
Summon Fey (R3 [Fey Wanderer Spells] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40' and can teleport 30'; multiattack equal to half the spell level; short sword inflicts 1d6+6 HP piercing plus 1d6 force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting), or tricksy (can create darkness in a 5' cube for 1 rd after teleporting) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and piercing damage by 1]
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Druidic Warrior: Knows 2 Druid cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Ranger level
Foe Slayer: Has increased Hunter's Mark effects
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Favored Enemy: Can cast Hunter's Mark without expending a spell slot 6 times per long rest
Fey Reinforcements: Can cast Summon Fey without expending a spell slot, optionally for 1 min instead of for concentration, once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Misty Wanderer: Can cast Misty Step without expending a spell slot 2 times per long rest, and Misty Step can take along a willing adjacent creature
Relentless Hunter: Damage does not break concentration on Hunter's Mark
Share Spells: R30' Can cast spells on self that also affect companion
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the ranger spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 2 available vs. 6 allocated
